use_codes.desc: USE OF NALOXONE FOR THE EMERGENCY TREATMENT OF KNOWN OR SUSPECTED OPIOID OVERDOSE, AS MANIFESTED BY RESPIRATORY AND/OR CENTRAL NERVOUS SYSTEM DEPRESSION, FOR ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS
